parsed.recommendation_text: The ASUS ZenBook 14 offers the best balance of quality and affordability for a student. Its OLED display provides vibrant visuals, and it's lightweight at just 1.28 kg. With 16GB RAM and a decent battery life of 13 hours, it handles everyday tasks like web browsing, document editing, and light multimedia with ease. The ZenBook also includes Windows 11 Home for broad software compatibility. While the Intel Core Ultra 5 processor is less powerful than some alternatives, its price point makes it an excellent value.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances quality and affordability; OLED display offers vibrant visuals.
